title: Cluster analysis
description: A theoretical and practical guide for K-Mean clustering and Latent Profile Analysis in R
contents:
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(diamonds, aes(carat, price)) + geom_smooth() +
  facet_grid(~ cut)
